message:
fix(daemon): add CPU budget monitoring, stale PID detection, and default subcommand

Daemon improvements (86 ins, 22 del):

CPU overhead budget:
- Track CPU usage via current_cpu_seconds() sampling between ticks
- Compare cpu_delta/wall_time against config.max_cpu_percent
- Record OverheadBudgetExceeded event and skip scan when exceeded

Stale PID detection:
- On startup, check for existing PID file before claiming lock
- If PID belongs to a running process, abort with LockError
- If PID is stale (process not running), clean up and continue

Default subcommand:
- DaemonArgs.command is now Option<DaemonCommands>
- None defaults to start in foreground mode (daemon start --foreground)

Event recording fix:
- Record TickCompleted event on every tick, not only on escalation
- Prevents silent ticks from being invisible in daemon state log

Conditional compilation:
- Gate serde and std::io::Write imports with #[cfg(feature = "daemon")]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
